name: Penne with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Penne, or other tube pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Earlier in the day, add enough water to the skinless chicken breasts to cover them.
2. Poach the chicken in simmering water (uncovered) until it is no longer pink. This will take about 8 minutes.
3. Allow the chicken to cool in the poaching liquid. You can put it in the refrigerator rather than leaving it at room temperature; cooling it in the liquid makes it more tender.
4. Later, remove the chicken from the poaching liquid and chop it into small or bite-size pieces.
5. Save the poaching liquid to add to the water you'll use for cooking the pasta.
6. In a large non-stick pan, cook the green onion and garlic in heated olive oil until softened.
7. Add the hot pepper flakes and tomatoes with juice; cook over medium heat until the sauce thickens, about 30 minutes.
8. Cook the penne in the poaching liquid with additional water as needed.
9. Combine the chicken with the sauce mixture in a serving bowl.
10. Add parsley and cheese; sprinkle with Parmesan before serving immediately.
Judy Garnett/pjxg05a
